test: uv sync --project python --frozen && uv run --project python pytest -q python/tests && if test -f mork_ffi/Cargo.toml; then cargo build --manifest-path mork_ffi/Cargo.toml --release && gcc -shared -fPIC -o "${CARGO_TARGET_DIR}/release/morklib.so" mork_ffi/mork.c $(pkg-config --cflags --libs swipl); else echo 'mork_ffi is not tracked at this revision; skipping optional native build'; fi
